PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Jun-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kenneth Mitchell for John Clegg.

Mr. Mitchell stated the efforts made in locating Mr. Clegg. The Court granted the petition (order for the same signed in open Court).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
